name: io.github.matthewdtowles/iwantmymtg-mcp
description: Query Magic: The Gathering cards, sets, and prices and manage your I Want My MTG collection.

environmentVariables.name: IWMM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Personal IWMM API key (iwm_live_...). Optional; required only for the inventory, transaction, portfolio, and price-alert tools.
